# Crestline Clearing & Logistics (U) Ltd

> Kampala-based customs clearing and freight forwarding company helping importers, exporters and corporates move cargo across Uganda and worldwide by air, sea and land.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Crestline's customs clearing and logistics services in Uganda.
- [About](/about): Company background, mission and team.
- [Services](/services): Customs clearing, freight forwarding, air/sea/land freight, warehousing and supply chain solutions.
- [Why Us](/why-us): Reasons importers and exporters choose Crestline — speed, compliance and reliability.
- [Track Shipment](/track): Track an active shipment.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, email, office location and business hours in Kampala, Uganda.
